mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT year FROM eval_type_52 ORDER BY year DESC

SELECT tr.type_id AS typeId, d.name AS deptName, d.leader_emp_no AS leaderEmpNo, e.position AS position, e.emp_no AS empNo, e.name AS empName, fr.grade AS totalGrade, CASE WHEN tr.status = 0 THEN '본인평가중' ELSE '1차평가대기' END AS status FROM type_result_52 tr JOIN employee_52 e ON tr.emp_no = e.emp_no JOIN department_52 d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN final_result_52 fr ON e.emp_no = fr.emp_no AND fr.year = (SELECT year FROM eval_type_52 WHERE id = #{typeId}) WHERE tr.type_id = #{typeId} AND tr.emp_no = #{empNo}

SELECT q.id AS questionId, q.category AS categoryName, q.question AS goalDesc, a1.content AS selfFeedback, a1.score AS selfScore, a2.content AS firstFeedback, a2.score AS firstScore FROM eval_question_52 q LEFT JOIN eval_answer_52 a1 ON q.id = a1.question_id AND a1.mapping_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND step = 'SELF') LEFT JOIN eval_answer_52 a2 ON q.id = a2.question_id AND a2.mapping_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND step = 'FIRST') WHERE q.type_id = #{typeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE eval_answer_52 SET content = #{item.selfFeedback}, score = #{item.selfScore}, updated_at = GETDATE() WHERE question_id = #{item.questionId} AND mapping_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND step = 'SELF')

UPDATE eval_answer_52 SET content = #{item.firstFeedback}, score = #{item.firstScore}, updated_at = GETDATE() WHERE question_id = #{item.questionId} AND mapping_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND step = 'FIRST')
UPDATE type_result_52 SET status = #{status}, updated_at = GETDATE() WHERE type_id = #{typeId} AND emp_no = #{empNo}
